description: The contact form should focus the Name field on page load and again after clicking Reset, but the name field never receives focus in either case.
expectedOutcome: On load and after clicking Reset, the Name input should receive focus so the user can type without clicking into the field.
hint: Refs passed to a custom component don't reach the DOM unless the component forwards them.
symptom: Name field is not focused on page load or after clicking Reset.
solution: Wrap FormInput with React.forwardRef and pass the ref to the underlying native input; ensure Contact.jsx focuses on mount via useEffect and on reset in handleReset.
